nasb.text: The Lord will guard your going out and your coming in From this time forth and forever.

esv.text: The Lord will keep your going out and your coming in from this time forth and forevermore.

cnv.text: 你出你入，耶和華要保護你， 從現在直到永遠。

ccb.text: 不论你出或入， 耶和华都会保护你，从现在直到永远。

csbs.text: 你出你入，耶和华都保守你， 从今直到永远！
